intended_use: The Venue Fit is a general purpose diagnostic ultrasound system for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals for ultrasound imaging, measurement, display and analysis of the human body an
intended_use_full: The Venue Fit is a general purpose diagnostic ultrasound system for use by qualified and trained healthcare professionals for ultrasound imaging, measurement, display and analysis of the human body and fluid. Venue Fit is intended to be used in a hospital or medical clinic. Venue Fit clinical applications include: abdominal (GYN and Urology), thoracic/pleural, ophthalmic, Fetal/OB, Small Organ (including breast, testes, thyroid), Vascular/Peripheral vascular, neonatal and adult cephalic, pediatric, musculoskeletal (conventional and superficial), cardiac (adults and pediatric), Transrectal, Transvaginal, Transesophageal, Intraoperative (vascular) and interventional guidance (includes tissue biopsy, fluid drainage, vascular and non-vascular access).
target_condition: Nerve block procedures; slow blood flow visualization; probe malfunction; pediatric lung pathology (B-lines); shoulder disorders; cardiac assessment (ejection fraction)
ground_truth: Ground truth annotations of nerve bundles in individual frames obtained from a single clinical expert marking the anatomical area of nerves in each frame
other_metrics: Frame accuracy (pixel-level accuracy); Sequence accuracy requirement: at least 70% of sequences meaningfully detected, and at least 80% of meaningfully detected sequences successfully detected (meeting frame accuracy criteria)
